panels.title: [Deployment] Observability data coverage
panels.description: Fast top-level coverage check before interpreting the rest of the dashboard.

options.content: **Start here.** These cards answer whether Grafana currently has live Prometheus metrics, Loki logs, retrieval telemetry, and embedding telemetry. Red/missing means Grafana may be healthy but lacks the data needed to understand deployment state; drill into Docker/Dagster/runtime checks before trusting lower panels.

panels.title: [Deployment] Prometheus metrics present
panels.description: At least one core fourok Prometheus metric is present. Missing means scraping/exporter/runtime data is absent, so lower metric panels may be empty.

panels.title: [Deployment] Recent fourok log streams
panels.description: Recent Docker log streams for the selected compose project. This is log activity, not container health; quiet services can be healthy.

panels.title: [Deployment] Retrieval telemetry present
panels.description: Privacy-safe live retrieval/search request telemetry. Missing means agent retrieval usage is not observable even if indexed records exist.

panels.title: [Deployment] Embedding coverage complete
panels.description: Embedding coverage for current retrieval units. Missing means vector search is incomplete even if retrieval text exists.

options.content: **Read left to right.** Each lineage node shows the total count of latest-run non-SUCCESS Dagster stages in that slice. Green = 0 failing stages. Red = one or more failing stages. Grey/no data = metric missing. Use the red-stage panel below for exact failing step names.

panels.title: ① Raw landing
panels.description: Lineage node for latest (meltano_.*_raw_landing|fourok_.*_raw_landing) Dagster stages. The value is the total number of latest-run non-SUCCESS stages; 0 means this slice is green.

panels.title: ② Source records
panels.description: Lineage node for latest fourok_.*source_records.* Dagster stages. The value is the total number of latest-run non-SUCCESS stages; 0 means this slice is green.

panels.title: ③ Retrieval records
panels.description: Lineage node for latest fourok_retrieval_records Dagster stages. The value is the total number of latest-run non-SUCCESS stages; 0 means this slice is green.

panels.title: ④ Operator dashboard
panels.description: Lineage node for latest fourok_operator_dashboard Dagster stages. The value is the total number of latest-run non-SUCCESS stages; 0 means this slice is green.

panels.title: ⑤ Audit metadata
panels.description: Lineage node for latest fourok_audit_metadata Dagster stages. The value is the total number of latest-run non-SUCCESS stages; 0 means this slice is green.

panels.title: ↳ Entity links
panels.description: Lineage node for latest fourok_.*entity_links.* Dagster stages. The value is the total number of latest-run non-SUCCESS stages; 0 means this slice is green.

panels.title: [Pipeline] Non-success Dagster stages (latest run)
panels.description: Readable list of current non-success latest-run stages. Empty table means no failing/in-progress stages for the selected Dagster job.

panels.title: [Pipeline] Minutes since successful hourly backfill
panels.description: Backfill SLA freshness. Values above the hourly cadence are a blocker even if other indicators are green.

panels.title: [Pipeline] Latest live connector run status
panels.description: Latest connector run status by connector; non-success indicates source-specific ingestion work.

panels.title: [Pipeline] Live connector freshness age (minutes)
panels.description: Minutes since each live connector job last finished. This is run freshness, not data freshness. Healthy target: <=65m (green); 65-120m is warning; >120m is stale/red. Excludes fixture/Gmail-singer paths.

panels.title: [Pipeline] Source freshness age by connector (minutes)
panels.description: Minutes since the newest active imported source record per source_system (`max(source_records.updated_at)`). This is data freshness, not connector-run completion. Healthy target: <=7d / 10080m (green); 7-14d is warning; >14d is stale/red.

panels.title: [Pipeline] Dagster step duration seconds
panels.description: Latest Dagster step durations. Failure state is shown by the lineage health map and non-success stages table above.

targets.expr: fourok_search_requests_total or fourok_retrieval_prepare_total or fourok_evidence_pack_items or fourok_retrieval_records_total

panels.title: [Metrics] Raw landed records by connector/stream
panels.description: Lower-priority volume detail: raw landed records by connector and stream.

panels.title: [Metrics] Processed canonical objects by type
panels.description: Time-series count of processed canonical objects by type.

panels.title: [Metrics] Canonical object type ratio
panels.description: Pie chart for the current ratio of processed canonical object types.
How often fourok retrieve is triggered, grouped by status and retriever set. Uses persisted request events so short-lived CLI calls are visible.
panels.title: [Retrieval] Requests by status/retriever

panels.description: Average resources found before reranking/diversification, plus distinct sources and final returned cards. This helps spot recall collapse vs reranker/display issues.
panels.title: [Retrieval] Candidates found before reranking

panels.description: Counts retrievals that returned no evidence cards. Spikes usually mean stale data, bad query rewriting, permission gaps, or broken retriever inputs.
panels.title: [Retrieval] Zero-result requests

panels.description: Average retrieval latency by status/retriever set. Use with candidate panels to distinguish slow broad recall from failures.

targets.expr: sum by (status, retriever_set) (increase(fourok_retrieval_duration_ms_sum[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (status, retriever_set) (increase(fourok_retrieval_requests_total[$__rate_interval])), 1)

panels.title: [Retrieval] Average duration (ms)

panels.description: Share of current retrieval units that already have a vector embedding. 1.0 means everything currently retrievable is embedded.
panels.title: [Embedding] Coverage ratio

panels.description: Current retrieval units that still need a row in chunk_embeddings before vector search is complete.
panels.title: [Embedding] Missing retrieval units

panels.description: Duration of the latest fourok_retrieval_records Dagster step, which prepares retrieval units and writes vector embeddings.
panels.title: [Embedding] Latest indexing duration seconds
[Logs] Runtime log activity by service (15m rolling count)
panels.description: Rolling count of Loki log lines by compose service. This is log activity, not container health; quiet services can disappear even when healthy. Use container health/status panels for liveness.

panels.title: [Tracing] Recent fourok traces (Tempo)
panels.description: Recent named fourok spans. Filters out low-level DB connect spans so operators see pipeline/retrieval work first.

panels.title: [Logs] Last 5 Dagster failures
panels.description: Only ERROR-level STEP_FAILURE lines from Dagster code (tail, 5 rows).

panels.title: [Logs] Latest 5 runtime errors by service
panels.description: Bottom drilldown: recent runtime errors after checking pipeline status/freshness first.

panels.title: [Logs] Last 5 Dagster code logs
panels.description: Dagster runtime-service logs (tail, 5 rows).

panels.title: [Logs] Last 5 fourok Docker logs
panels.description: Tail of all logs for this compose project, limited to 5 rows.

list.description: Filter log and log-derived panels by compose service
list.label: Compose service
list.name: compose_service
